_comment: CARICOM Document Type Definitions - controls XLSX output behavior

_meta.purpose: CARICOM document type definitions and consignee -> doc_type routing rules
covers: Document type codes (4000-000 Standard Import, 7400-000 Warehouse)
Consignee-match rules overriding the default (Budget Marine -> 7400-000)
update_checklist: If a rule changes retroactively, regenerate affected shipments

4000-000.notes: Items grouped by tariff code — group header row + detail rows per tariff

7400-000.notes: No grouping — one row per item, no group/detail pairs

consolidation_report.notes: Maps package counts and freight charges to individual invoice numbers. Used to cross-reference invoices and detect missing documents.
